name: HMS ML 138 (ML 138)
events: 21 Apr 1941 HMS H 50 (Lt. P.R.H. Harrison, DSC, RN) departed Portsmouth for Sheerness, She was escorted by HMS ML 138 and another Motor Launch [The number given in the log of HMS H 50 is incorrect]. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
